testsuite.name: Класс Тестов на регистрацию нового пользователя

testcase.name: Заполнив все обязательные поля должно появиться модальное окно с заполнеными данными

testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - No webdriver is bound to current thread: 1 - let's create a new webdriver [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.FileHelper - Creating folder: C:\AQA\AQA-start\build\downloads\1777139168826_26640_1 апр. 25, 2026 8:47:25 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 апр. 25, 2026 8:47:25 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.167. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - BrowserName=chrome Version=146.0.7680.167 Platform=windows [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenide v. 7.2.0 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenium WebDriver v. 4.18.1 build revision: b1d3319b48 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.CreateDriverCommand - Created webdriver in thread 1: ChromeDriver -> ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (dd8a79a0bebd549efdc6284889e99c9e), downloadsFolder: C:\AQA\AQA-start\build\downloads\1777139168826_26640_1 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Register WebDriverInstance[config=StaticConfig, webDriver=ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (dd8a79a0bebd549efdc6284889e99c9e), proxy=null, downloadsFolder=C:\AQA\AQA-start\build\downloads\1777139168826_26640_1] in 1 [size=1] [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Add shutdown hook in 1 [size=1] [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - Browser will stay open due to holdBrowserOpen=true: 1 -> ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (dd8a79a0bebd549efdc6284889e99c9e)
